method: satellite. Method 1 (metaball-M bbox width / 3) = 312.677; Method 2 (largest satellite diameter) = 271.389; they disagree 13.2% (>10% threshold), so the satellite method is used per spec.
notes: m_bbox and wordmark_bbox from alpha-bbox render (@resvg/resvg-js, 9000px master render, ~1.3 user-unit precision). mark_bbox is exact: driven by the outer satellite circles whose extents are analytic (center +/- r*scale from each transform matrix; the metaball-M path is interior). Satellite effective radius = 160.41 * hypot(a,b) from each circle's transform matrix; three distinct satellite scales present, diameters {135.19, 175.37, 271.39}.
